subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath sought the Countenance and voiced the praise of God, the Lord of existence. This is the Day whereon mankind hath arisen unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اراد الوجه و نطق بثناء الله مالک الوجود هذا یوم فیه قام الناس لله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
